branch.frontier_task_title: Project Skillful Actor state into HRI and self-hosting proof
branch.branch_summary: Start TASK-054 by projecting Skillful Actor packet, assignment evaluation, execution gate, benchmark status, council review need, blocker state, and next action into the Human Recognition Interface and committing one self-hosting proof chain.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-054 sits on v5.0 after shipped v4.0.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime: turn skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and metrics into live actor assignment and council-reviewed workforce judgment while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-054: Project Skillful Actor state into HRI and self-hosting proof
